name: Toggle Switch Task Lamp Brass - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Decorate and illuminate your space with elegance using the Toggle Switch Brass Task Lamp from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This stunning task lamp features a bowl-shaped shade and a pedestal base, both joined by a brass rod. It's made with iron in a brass golden finish to complement your existing decor, and the on/off light setting with a base rocker switch allows for easy operation. Add this lamp to your home office or living room to study, work, or read in style.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
